metadata.description: Mortgage workflow task roadmap for LOS import

subcategories.name: File Setup
subcategories.description: Initial loan setup and disclosure tasks

tasks.name: Review Credit
tasks.description: Review borrower credit report for accuracy and issues
tasks.notes: Comprehensive credit review including red flags, OFAC, fraud alerts, and lien verification
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied at loan application submission. Triggers when loan is created and borrower SSN is provided.

subtasks.name: Red Flags Review
subtasks.description: Review credit report for red flags: Name, Address, SSN discrepancies
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when credit review task is created

subtasks.name: OFAC
subtasks.description: Office of Foreign Assets Control screening for all parties
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when credit review task is created

subtasks.name: Fraud Alerts
subtasks.description: Review and address any fraud alerts on credit report
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when credit review task is created

subtasks.name: Frozen Score
subtasks.description: Identify and address frozen credit scores
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when credit review task is created

subtasks.name: Review Liens
subtasks.description: Review liens and ensure they are tied to all VOMs (Verification of Mortgage)
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when credit review task is created

tasks.name: Send Disclosures
tasks.description: Send required loan disclosures to borrower
tasks.notes: Agent should include subtasks for: Loan Estimate, Initial Disclosures, TRID compliance verification, borrower acknowledgment tracking
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied within 3 business days of loan application. Triggers after loan is created and borrower intent to proceed is confirmed.

tasks.name: Run AUS
tasks.description: Submit loan to Automated Underwriting System
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: AUS submission (DU/LP), review findings, address cautions/warnings, generate certification
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after initial disclosures sent and minimum loan data is complete. Triggers when borrower info, property details, and income/asset estimates are entered.

tasks.name: Organize eFolder
tasks.description: Organize and categorize loan documents in electronic folder
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: create folder structure, categorize uploaded documents, verify document quality, index key documents
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan is created. Ongoing task that is updated as documents are received throughout the process.

tasks.name: Order Appraisal
tasks.description: Order property appraisal and collect required forms
tasks.notes: Task can be reopened when new subtasks are assigned based on conditions
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after disclosures sent and appraisal fee collected. Triggers when property address is confirmed and borrower has signed appraisal authorization.

subtasks.name: Create Invoice
subtasks.description: Generate appraisal invoice for borrower
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Send Invoice
subtasks.description: Send appraisal invoice to borrower
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when intent to proceed is received

subtasks.name: Payment Recording
subtasks.description: Record appraisal payment received
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Order 1004
subtasks.description: Order 1004 appraisal form for single family property
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when payment is received AND property type is single family

subtasks.name: 1004 Form
subtasks.description: Collect completed 1004 appraisal form
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: 1025 Form
subtasks.description: Collect completed 1025 appraisal form
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: 1073 Form
subtasks.description: Collect completed 1073 appraisal form
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

tasks.name: Order Title
tasks.description: Order title search and examination
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: title search request, preliminary title report review, exception review, lien verification, title commitment
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan is in processing. Triggers when property address is confirmed and purchase contract is received (for purchase loans) or after appraisal is ordered (for refinance).

tasks.name: Order Flood Certificate
tasks.description: Determine if property is in flood zone and order flood insurance if required
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: FEMA flood zone determination, flood certificate review, flood insurance verification (if in zone), community participation verification
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after property address is confirmed. Triggers when appraisal is ordered or earlier if property details are available.

tasks.name: ARM Disclosure
tasks.description: Provide ARM-specific disclosures for adjustable rate mortgages
tasks.notes: Conditional task only for ARM loans
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied only for ARM loan products. Triggers when loan type is set to ARM/Adjustable Rate.

subtasks.name: Adjustable Rate Disclosure
subtasks.description: Provide ARM disclosure document to borrower
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when ARM disclosure task is created

subtasks.name: Consumer Handbook on ARM
subtasks.description: Provide CHARM booklet to borrower
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when ARM disclosure task is created

tasks.name: Credit Score Disclosure
tasks.description: Provide credit score disclosure when a new credit report is pulled
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: generate disclosure notice, send to borrower, obtain acknowledgment
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied conditionally when a new credit score is pulled. Triggers when credit is re-pulled during the loan process (e.g., credit refresh, AUS resubmission requiring new credit).

tasks.name: Withdraw Loan
tasks.description: Process loan withdrawal at borrower request
tasks.notes: Loan withdrawn by borrower. Includes Massachusetts-specific disclosures when applicable.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when borrower requests to withdraw application. Triggers when borrower cancels loan before closing.

subtasks.name: ECOA Right to Copy of Appraisal
subtasks.description: Send ECOA notice of right to receive copy of appraisal
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is located in Massachusetts

subtasks.name: Massachusetts MGL Disclosure
subtasks.description: Send Massachusetts General Laws disclosure
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is located in Massachusetts

subtasks.name: Credit Score Disclosure
subtasks.description: Provide credit score disclosure if credit was pulled
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when credit report was pulled during application process

tasks.name: Send Denial
tasks.description: Send loan denial notice and adverse action disclosures
tasks.notes: Loan denied during processing. Includes Massachusetts-specific disclosures when applicable.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when loan is denied before underwriting submission. Triggers when processing determines loan cannot proceed to underwriting.

subtasks.name: MA Review Board Form
subtasks.description: Send Massachusetts Review Board form for appeals process
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is located in Massachusetts

subtasks.name: ECOA Right to Copy of Appraisal
subtasks.description: Send ECOA notice of right to receive copy of appraisal
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is located in Massachusetts

subtasks.name: Massachusetts MGL Disclosure
subtasks.description: Send Massachusetts General Laws disclosure
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is located in Massachusetts

subtasks.name: Credit Score Disclosure
subtasks.description: Provide credit score disclosure with adverse action notice
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when credit report was pulled during application process

tasks.name: Order SSA-89
tasks.description: Request SSA-89 verification for Social Security income
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: borrower authorization, SSA-89 request submission, response review, income verification documentation. Only needed when borrower claims SS income.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied conditionally when borrower income includes Social Security benefits. Triggers when income type 'Social Security' is selected on application.

tasks.name: Order Tax Transcripts
tasks.description: Request IRS tax transcripts for income verification
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: 4506-C form completion, IRS transcript request (1040, W-2, 1099), transcript review, income verification against application, self-employed income analysis (if applicable)
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied for most loan types requiring income verification. Triggers after initial disclosures sent or when income documentation is needed. May be waived for certain automated underwriting approvals.

tasks.name: Verify Assets
tasks.description: Verify borrower assets and source of funds
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: collect bank statements, verify account ownership, source large deposits, calculate reserves, verify gift funds (if applicable)
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after AUS is run and asset requirements are identified. Triggers when loan is in processing and ready for documentation collection.

tasks.name: Verify Income
tasks.description: Verify borrower income and employment
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: collect paystubs, VOE (verbal/written), review tax returns, calculate qualifying income, verify employment history
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after AUS is run and income requirements are identified. Triggers when loan is in processing and ready for documentation collection.

tasks.name: Order HOI
tasks.description: Order homeowners insurance and verify coverage
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: request insurance declaration, verify coverage amounts, verify lender named as mortgagee, confirm policy effective date, review deductibles
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan receives conditional approval or clear to close. Triggers when loan is approved and property is identified.

tasks.name: Send Commitment Letter
tasks.description: Send loan commitment letter to borrower with conditions
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: generate commitment letter, document conditions, send to borrower, obtain borrower acknowledgment, set condition deadlines
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after underwriting approval with conditions. Triggers when loan receives conditional approval and borrower needs to be notified of approval terms.

tasks.name: Underwrite
tasks.description: Submit loan file to underwriter for review and approval
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: package file, submit to underwriter, track submission, initial review, generate findings
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when file is submitted to underwriting. Triggers when all required documentation is collected and loan is ready for underwriting review.

tasks.name: Review Title
tasks.description: Review title commitment and address underwriting conditions
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: review title commitment, identify exceptions, clear title conditions, verify vesting, review liens and encumbrances
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied during underwriting resubmittal. Triggers when title commitment is received and underwriter requires title review or conditions.

tasks.name: Review Appraisal
tasks.description: Review appraisal report and address underwriting conditions
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: review appraisal value, verify property condition, address underwriter comments, verify comparable sales, review appraiser certifications
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied during underwriting resubmittal. Triggers when appraisal is received and underwriter requires appraisal review or conditions.

tasks.name: Review Flood Insurance
tasks.description: Review flood insurance documentation and address underwriting conditions
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: verify flood zone determination, review flood insurance policy, verify coverage amounts, address underwriter conditions, confirm NFIP compliance
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied during underwriting resubmittal. Triggers when flood documentation is required by underwriter or property is in flood zone.

tasks.name: Clear to Close
tasks.description: Obtain final clear to close approval from underwriter
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: verify all conditions cleared, final underwriting review, obtain CTC approval, send CTC notification, prepare for closing
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after all underwriting conditions are cleared. Triggers when final documentation is complete and underwriter is ready to issue clear to close.

tasks.name: Deny Loan
tasks.description: Process loan denial and send adverse action notice
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: prepare denial letter, document denial reasons, send adverse action notice, provide FCRA disclosures, close loan file
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when loan is denied by underwriter. Triggers when underwriting determines loan does not meet approval criteria.

tasks.name: CounterOffer
tasks.description: Present counteroffer terms to borrower
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: prepare counteroffer letter, document revised terms, send to borrower, obtain borrower response, update loan file with decision
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when underwriter provides alternative loan terms. Triggers when loan doesn't meet original criteria but alternative terms are available.

tasks.name: Scheduling
tasks.description: Schedule closing appointment with all parties
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: coordinate with title company, schedule borrower, confirm closing date/time, send appointment confirmations, verify closing location
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after clear to close is received. Triggers when loan is approved and ready for closing coordination.

tasks.name: Send Initial CD
tasks.description: Send initial Closing Disclosure to borrower
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: generate initial CD, review CD accuracy, send to borrower, obtain borrower acknowledgment, start 3-day waiting period
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied at least 3 business days before closing. Triggers when final loan terms are confirmed and clear to close is issued.

tasks.name: Balance CD
tasks.description: Balance Closing Disclosure with final figures
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: verify all fees, reconcile with LE, confirm payoff amounts, verify closing funds, finalize CD
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied 1-2 days before closing. Triggers when final payoff statements and closing figures are received.

tasks.name: Prepare Closing Package
tasks.description: Prepare complete closing document package
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: generate closing docs, review all documents, send to title company, prepare funding package, organize final conditions
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied 1 day before closing. Triggers after CD is balanced and all closing conditions are cleared.

tasks.name: Confirm Funding Figures
tasks.description: Confirm all funding figures and wire amounts
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: verify final CD, confirm wire amounts, verify disbursements, review funding worksheet, obtain final approvals
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after closing documents are signed. Triggers when closing is complete and ready for funding.

tasks.name: Approve Funding Figures
tasks.description: Obtain approval for funding figures
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: submit for approval, obtain department head approval, verify investor approval, final compliance review, authorize funding
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after funding figures are confirmed. Triggers when all figures are verified and ready for final approval.

tasks.name: Fund Loan
tasks.description: Execute funding and wire transfer
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: initiate wire transfer, confirm funds received by title, record funding date/time, update loan status, send funding notifications
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after funding is approved. Triggers when final approval is received and within funding deadline.

tasks.name: Board Loan
tasks.description: Board loan into servicing system
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: prepare boarding package, submit to servicing, verify loan setup, confirm payment schedule, verify escrow setup
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan is funded. Triggers when funding is complete and loan needs to be set up for servicing.

tasks.name: Run UCD
tasks.description: Run Uniform Closing Dataset (UCD) validation
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: generate UCD file, validate UCD data, submit to investor, address validation errors, confirm acceptance
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan is boarded. Triggers when loan is set up in servicing and ready for UCD submission.

tasks.name: Activate MERS
tasks.description: Activate loan in MERS (Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems)
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: register loan in MERS, verify MERS MIN, update servicer information, confirm registration, generate MERS confirmation
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan is boarded. Triggers when loan setup is complete and MERS registration is required.

tasks.name: Activate MI
tasks.description: Activate mortgage insurance policy
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: submit loan to MI company, verify MI certificate, activate policy, confirm coverage, set up MI billing
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied conditionally after loan is boarded. Triggers when loan has mortgage insurance and policy needs activation.

tasks.name: Credit Refresh
tasks.description: Pull updated credit report before closing
tasks.notes: Pre-closing quality control task
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied within 5 days before closing. Triggers automatically based on closing date or when Clear to Close is issued.

subtasks.name: Red Flags Review
subtasks.description: Review refreshed credit report for red flags
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when credit refresh task is created

subtasks.name: Inquiries/New Credit Review
subtasks.description: Review new credit inquiries and accounts since initial pull
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when credit refresh task is created

tasks.name: Fraud X Report
tasks.description: Run fraud detection report
tasks.notes: Fraud detection and verification
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied before final approval. Triggers when loan is in underwriting review or before Clear to Close.

subtasks.name: Appraiser License
subtasks.description: Verify appraiser license is valid
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when fraud report task is created

subtasks.name: Red Flags
subtasks.description: Review fraud report for red flags
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when fraud report task is created

subtasks.name: All Parties
subtasks.description: Verify all parties involved in the transaction
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when fraud report task is created

tasks.name: Deliver Note
tasks.description: Deliver promissory note to appropriate party
tasks.notes: Deliver note based on loan disposition - secondary market or portfolio
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan closing and funding. Triggers when closing documents are executed and note needs to be delivered.

subtasks.name: Deliver to Secondary
subtasks.description: Deliver note to secondary market investor
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when loan is sold to secondary market

subtasks.name: Deliver to Operations
subtasks.description: Deliver note to operations for portfolio retention
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when loan is retained in portfolio

tasks.name: Record Mortgage
tasks.description: Record mortgage at registry of deeds
tasks.notes: Required for equity loans and MassHousing second mortgages
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied conditionally after closing. Triggers when loan type is home equity or MassHousing second mortgage requiring recording.

tasks.name: Deliver Mortgage
tasks.description: Deliver recorded mortgage to appropriate party
tasks.notes: Deliver mortgage based on loan disposition - secondary market or portfolio
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after mortgage is recorded (if applicable) or closing is complete. Triggers when mortgage document needs to be delivered.

subtasks.name: Deliver to Secondary
subtasks.description: Deliver mortgage to secondary market investor
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when loan is sold to secondary market

subtasks.name: Deliver to Operations
subtasks.description: Deliver mortgage to operations for portfolio retention
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when loan is retained in portfolio

tasks.name: Image Documents
tasks.description: Image and upload paper documents to Encompass
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: scan paper documents, review image quality, upload to Encompass eFolder, verify document indexing, dispose of paper per retention policy
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after closing when paper documents are received. Triggers when physical closing packages are returned and need to be digitized.

tasks.name: eFolder Cleanup
tasks.description: Clean up and organize eFolder in Encompass
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: remove duplicate documents, verify all documents properly indexed, organize folder structure, remove temporary/draft documents, final quality review
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after all post-closing documents are received and imaged. Triggers when loan file is ready for final organization before archival.

tasks.name: Transfer to Cold Storage
tasks.description: Transfer completed loan file to cold storage/archive
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: verify file completeness, export final loan package, transfer to archive system, verify successful transfer, update loan status to archived
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after eFolder cleanup is complete. Triggers when loan file is finalized and ready for long-term storage per retention requirements.

tasks.name: Transfer to SaaS
tasks.description: Transfer loan data to HMDA reporting SaaS platform
tasks.notes: Agent should create subtasks for: verify HMDA data accuracy, export loan data, upload to HMDA SaaS system, validate data transfer, confirm successful import
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan closing for HMDA reportable loans. Triggers when loan needs to be reported for Home Mortgage Disclosure Act compliance.
